channel.title: project on Jeremy Nauta
channel.description: Recent content in project on Jeremy Nauta

item.title: Enumeration - Best Practices
item.description: The Dream Dear fellow developers, let me propose a big idea. In the age of multi-repository and multi-language projects, it should be easy to create, understand, and manage enumerations and constants in a platform-independent manner. This is the end goal of my project, Enumerate.js. Differences of opinion have prevented this from happening in our world, but I am confident that this is possible. First, let me explain the issue with an example.
